name: Contemplative Pacing
description: Longer passages with reflective depth, slow builds, and atmospheric immersion. Best for literary fiction and character studies.
prompt_fragments: Allow scenes to develop slowly. Linger on sensory details and emotional undercurrents.
Longer paragraphs are welcome — let thoughts unspool naturally.
Silence, pauses, and what is left unsaid are as important as dialogue.
Build tension through accumulation rather than sudden reveals.
Endings of scenes should resonate rather than snap.

lexicon_preferences.notes: Patience is a virtue. Let the reader inhabit the scene.

validation_heuristics: Flag scenes under 300 words as potentially too rushed for contemplative pacing.
Flag more than two exclamation marks per scene.
